summary: Fixed attempt-1 compatibility gaps by propagating selected bullet sizes into UI-created GameState instances and updating persistence validation to accept valid US-842 deal-settlement/next-deal saves while rejecting malformed new-phase and base-field shapes. Orchestrator post-review added legacy pre-rule-engine save migration for both schema-one state envelopes and active bullet envelopes without bulletTarget.

tests_run.result: failed before fix, then passed after fix
tests_run.evidence: Red run failed 3 assertions where currentDeal.bulletTarget stayed 10 for selected 20/30; green run passed 9 tests.

tests_run.result: failed before fix, then passed after fix
tests_run.evidence: Red run rejected valid deal-settlement saves and accepted malformed bulletTarget; green run passed 28 tests.
21 tests passed, covering legal actions, trick resolution, settlement, next-deal, and bullet completion transitions.
Vitest: 9 files, 80 tests passed. Build: tsc and vite build completed successfully.

tests_run.result: passed after orchestrator post-review compatibility fix
tests_run.evidence: 30 persistence tests passed, including pre-rule-engine schema-one and active bullet envelope migration without bulletTarget.

tests_run.result: passed after orchestrator post-review compatibility fix
tests_run.evidence: Vitest: 9 files, 82 tests passed. Build: tsc and vite build completed successfully.

node_package_scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build

evidence_matrix.scenario: selected bullet target propagation into GameState
evidence_matrix.expected: activeBulletSettings.bulletSize equals currentDeal.bulletTarget for supported sizes selected through start/reset UI paths.
evidence_matrix.evidence: src/ui/controller.test.ts asserts selected 20 and in-game reset from selected 30 persist matching currentDeal.bulletTarget; npm run test -- src/ui/controller.test.ts passed after fix.

evidence_matrix.scenario: active bullet persistence/resume compatibility for new US-842 phases
evidence_matrix.expected: Valid deal-settlement and next-deal active bullet saves are accepted by loadActiveBullet.
evidence_matrix.evidence: src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts round-trips deal-settlement and next-deal saves with active bullet metadata; npm run test -- src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts passed after fix.

evidence_matrix.expected: Schema-one state envelopes and active bullet envelopes created before GameState.bulletTarget continue to load as active bullets with bulletTarget defaulted to 10.
evidence_matrix.evidence: src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts covers legacy {schema,state} and active bullet envelope migration without currentDeal.bulletTarget; npm run test -- src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts passed 30 tests; npm run verify passed 82 tests and build.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Migration defaults old saves to bulletTarget 10 because the old state payload did not carry bullet target inside GameState.

evidence_matrix.scenario: strict rejection of malformed new-phase saves
evidence_matrix.expected: Malformed new-phase summaries and malformed bulletTarget values are rejected.
evidence_matrix.evidence: src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts rejects missing settlementSummary, null previousSummary, and string bulletTarget; focused persistence suite passed.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Persistence validation is structural rather than a full semantic game-state verifier; semantic impossibilities remain covered by domain/state-machine tests.

evidence_matrix.scenario: no regression to MZ-202 legal-actions/trick/settlement tests
evidence_matrix.expected: Existing rule-machine domain behavior remains green.
evidence_matrix.evidence: npm run test -- src/domain/engine.test.ts passed 21 tests; npm run test -- src/domain/rules.test.ts passed 4 tests; final npm run verify passed all 82 tests and build.
